description: Product description These funny Christmas headbands come in 5 assorted designs - a pair of upturned elf feet in red and green tinsel, sparkling tinsel Candy Cane head boppers, sequin Christmas bows, festive reindeer antlers and mini Antlers with a red santa hat. Whether you are celebrating with friends at Christmas parties in the workplace or classroom or at family gatherings around the tree on Christmas morning, the sparkly elf booties make a merry novelty hair accessory for the festive season. The headband also makes a great stocking filler, party bag favour, lucky dip prize, classroom reward, office wear, and more. The cheerful festive headband hair accessories are a versatile choice for adding a final touch to your Christmas outfit, enhancing festive fancy-dress outfits, wearing to the classroom or office, or posing for pictures. These headbands produce an eye-catching twinkle that is perfect for the holiday spirit. The headbands are one size. A lightweight and durable accessory, the festive hairbands can be worn indoors and outdoors and are suitable for adults and children aged 14 and up. Sold in packs of 1, 2, 3, 6, 12 and 24 per order. Recommended for ages 14+. These fancy-dress costume accessories have been tested to EN71 and REACH regulations and are compliant with all applicable UK and EU safety requirements. Safety Warning WARNING! Keep away from fire. For adult use only.
